reviewed_proposals.title: Promote anomaly-delta monitor contract across heartbeat, board, and scorecard prompts
reviewed_proposals.summary: Routine heartbeat and scorecard output is still drifting toward narrative review; the stable pattern is signal_only for routine runs and agenda_candidate only for anomalies, deltas, and precedent gaps.
proposed_changes要点: Standardize anomaly-delta monitor prompts so routine runs emit signal_only
Reduce routine governance noise, keep Board rare
reviewed_proposals.reason: Low-risk docs/reporting policy change, no impact on protected paths or trust boundaries. Reversible with clear rollback path. Reduces board noise without affecting runtime behavior.

reviewed_proposals.title: Enforce user notification policy on cron jobs — token-management and completion-checker still set to delivery.mode announce
reviewed_proposals.summary: User explicitly instructed (v6 policy) that token management notifications should be OFF except mode switches. However, 3 cron jobs remain configured with delivery.mode: 'announce', sending unwanted Telegram notifications.
reviewed_proposals.reason: Low-risk policy enforcement, user preference alignment. No impact on core functionality. Reversible with simple config rollback. Eliminates unwanted notification spam.

review_conclusion: Board裁定に基づき、2件の低リスク提案を承認。docs/reporting/policy変更でprotected pathやtrust boundaryに影響せず、rollback可能。
next_actions: Apply approved changes in assisted mode
Monitor for any unexpected side effects
Document rollback procedures for both changes
governance_notes: Review performed per Board rules - approve low-risk docs/reporting/policy changes with assisted apply mode. Both proposals avoid protected paths, auth changes, or trust boundary modifications.
